description_long: This is a rounded, black ceramic cup with a wide opening and a single, sturdy handle. The exterior is decorated with vibrant, hand-drawn style neon lines and text, including the names 'Drake 'n' Josh' and 'Zoey 101' in colorful, playful fonts, referencing popular Nickelodeon TV shows. The cup features irregular green squiggles and orange patches along the rim and body, giving it a whimsical, artistic appearance. The handle is solid and ergonomically shaped for easy gripping. The interior of the cup is plain black, contrasting with the lively exterior. The overall design suggests a fun, collectible item, possibly intended for fans or as a novelty piece.
description: A black ceramic cup with a colorful, hand-drawn style design featuring 'Drake 'n' Josh' and 'Zoey 101' text, green squiggles, and orange patches, with a sturdy handle.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'Drake 'n' Josh' text in multicolored letters and the handle on the right.
description_view_1: Side view with the handle centered, showing green squiggles and partial text panels on either side.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the 'Zoey 101' text in colorful letters and the handle on the left.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with no handle visible, mainly showing the black surface with green and orange decorative patterns.
